title: Moving: Ancient hasidic melody at fallen soldier's funeral

title: Sgraffito: An ancient art for modern home decor
description: Sgraffito, an ancient technique of scratching through a surface to reveal a lower layer of contrasting color, is making a comeback in modern African home decor.
